violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food *. -Raw 10 pound chubs of beef found above pizza crust and shredded cheese boxes in cooler.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Duct tape used in the fridge for kitchen storage. Not a cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Fan guards for walk-in cooler dusty. -Ovens are greasy need cleaning -Cupboards are in need of cleaning -Fridge in kitchen with buildup of spilt sauces.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Walk-in cooler floor in need of cleaning under storage rack.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
